segment.source: Renders a toast-style notice box with a colored variant (info, success, warning, or error), matching icon, optional title, rich-text message, optional action link, and an optional dismiss button; warnings and errors announce as alerts to screen readers. Use it for: maintenance or downtime notices, status and confirmation messages, deprecation or policy warnings in a document. Prefer 'Inline Alert Notice' for a simpler non-dismissible box; 'Announcement Bar' for a page-top message.
